MB2_Core.cs File Reference

Classes

interface  DigitalOpus.MB.Core.MB2_EditorMethodsInterface
 M b2_ texture combiner editor methods. Contains functionality such as changeing texture formats Which is only available in the editor. These methods have all been put in a class so that the UnityEditor namespace does not need to be included in any of the the runtime classes. More...
